requirement_topic.en: Transport of Lithium Batteries — UN 38.3 and Dangerous-Goods Documentation to Egyptian Ports
requirement_topic.zh: 锂电池运输——UN 38.3及运抵埃及口岸的危险品文件
requirement_topic.zht: 鋰電池運輸——UN 38.3及運抵埃及口岸的危險品文件

summary.en: Lithium batteries are dangerous goods (UN 3480/UN 3481 for lithium-ion cells, batteries and equipment) and must pass UN Manual of Tests and Criteria Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) before transport. Shipments to Egyptian seaports (Alexandria, Port Said, Damietta) move under the IMDG Code for sea freight or the IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations / ICAO Technical Instructions for air, requiring a UN 38.3 test summary, correct UN packaging and marking, state-of-charge limits, lithium-battery handling labels, and a Dangerous Goods Declaration. Egypt applies these international transport rules at import; the same UN 38.3 evidence used for export from China is the baseline, but it must accompany the consignment together with the GOEIC import documentation.
summary.zh: 锂电池属危险品（锂离子电芯、电池及设备为UN 3480/UN 3481），运输前须通过《联合国试验和标准手册》第38.3节（UN 38.3）。运往埃及海港（亚历山大、塞得港、杜姆亚特）的货物，海运依IMDG规则、空运依IATA危险品规则／ICAO技术细则办理，需提供UN 38.3测试摘要、正确的UN包装与标记、荷电状态限值、锂电池操作标签及危险品申报单。埃及在进口环节适用上述国际运输规则；中国出口所用的UN 38.3证据为基础，但须随货并与GOEIC进口文件一并提交。
summary.zht: 鋰電池屬危險品（鋰離子電芯、電池及設備為UN 3480/UN 3481），運輸前須通過《聯合國試驗和標準手冊》第38.3節（UN 38.3）。運往埃及海港（亞歷山大、塞得港、杜姆亞特）的貨物，海運依IMDG規則、空運依IATA危險品規則／ICAO技術細則辦理，需提供UN 38.3測試摘要、正確的UN包裝與標記、荷電狀態限值、鋰電池操作標籤及危險品申報單。埃及在進口環節適用上述國際運輸規則；中國出口所用的UN 38.3證據為基礎，但須隨貨並與GOEIC進口文件一併提交。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Section 38.3 (UN 38.3) — lithium battery transport safety tests
IMDG Code (sea) / IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations and ICAO Technical Instructions (air)
GOEIC import documentation accompanying the dangerous-goods consignment — Egypt

summary.en: China applies the same international transport baseline: lithium batteries shipped from China require a UN 38.3 test summary and are classified under GB 38031 / GB/T 19521 and the national dangerous-goods transport rules, with export consignments handled under IMDG (sea) or IATA/ICAO (air). For domestic carriage, products must also meet GB transport-packaging and labelling requirements. The UN 38.3 test report generated for Chinese export is technically the same document Egypt expects, so this is the one area of strong overlap — the transport-test content does not change by destination.
summary.zh: 中国适用相同的国际运输基线：自中国运输的锂电池须备UN 38.3测试摘要，依GB 38031／GB/T 19521及国家危险货物运输规则分类，出口货物按IMDG（海运）或IATA/ICAO（空运）办理。国内运输还须符合GB运输包装与标签要求。为中国出口生成的UN 38.3测试报告，在技术上即埃及所要求的同一文件，故此为高度重叠的环节——运输测试内容不因目的地而改变。
summary.zht: 中國適用相同的國際運輸基線：自中國運輸的鋰電池須備UN 38.3測試摘要，依GB 38031／GB/T 19521及國家危險貨物運輸規則分類，出口貨物按IMDG（海運）或IATA/ICAO（空運）辦理。國內運輸還須符合GB運輸包裝與標籤要求。為中國出口生成的UN 38.3測試報告，在技術上即埃及所要求的同一文件，故此為高度重疊的環節——運輸測試內容不因目的地而改變。

standards_or_laws: UN 38.3 — adopted for lithium battery export from China
GB 38031 / GB/T 19521 — China lithium battery and dangerous-goods classification standards

gap.en: Transport is the area of greatest alignment: the UN 38.3 test summary used for Chinese export is the same evidence Egypt expects, so a compliant Chinese consignment is usually already transport-ready. Residual gaps are documentary and operational, not test-based: (1) the UN 38.3 summary, dangerous-goods declaration, packaging marks, and state-of-charge limits must physically accompany the consignment and match the commercial documents; (2) at Egyptian ports the dangerous-goods paperwork must be presented alongside the GOEIC import file, so a transport-compliant but GOEIC-unregistered shipment will still be held; (3) labelling and handling marks must be legible and correct for IMDG/IATA. No Egypt-specific transport test exists beyond UN 38.3.
gap.zh: 运输是契合度最高的环节：中国出口所用的UN 38.3测试摘要即埃及所要求的同一证据，故合规的中国货物通常已具备运输条件。剩余差距属文件与操作层面，而非测试：（1）UN 38.3摘要、危险品申报单、包装标记及荷电状态限值须实物随货并与商业单证一致；（2）在埃及口岸，危险品文件须与GOEIC进口档案一并出示，故运输合规但未在GOEIC注册的货物仍会被扣留；（3）标签与操作标记须按IMDG/IATA清晰正确。除UN 38.3外不存在埃及专属运输测试。
gap.zht: 運輸是契合度最高的環節：中國出口所用的UN 38.3測試摘要即埃及所要求的同一證據，故合規的中國貨物通常已具備運輸條件。剩餘差距屬文件與操作層面，而非測試：（1）UN 38.3摘要、危險品申報單、包裝標記及荷電狀態限值須實物隨貨並與商業單證一致；（2）在埃及口岸，危險品文件須與GOEIC進口檔案一併出示，故運輸合規但未在GOEIC登記的貨物仍會被扣留；（3）標籤與操作標記須按IMDG/IATA清晰正確。除UN 38.3外不存在埃及專屬運輸測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 plus IMDG/IATA dangerous-goods packaging, marking and documentation required for lithium batteries shipped to Egypt; presented alongside the GOEIC import file at port
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 and national dangerous-goods transport rules (GB 38031 / GB/T 19521) required for lithium batteries carried from China

source.publisher: UNECE — UN Manual of Tests and Criteria (Section 38.3)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Transport is the strongest overlap: the UN 38.3 test summary used for Chinese export is the same evidence Egypt expects under IMDG/IATA, so a compliant consignment is usually transport-ready. The remaining work is documentary — the UN 38.3 summary, dangerous-goods declaration, packaging marks and state-of-charge limits must accompany the goods and be presented with the GOEIC import file at Alexandria, Port Said or Damietta. A transport-compliant but GOEIC-unregistered shipment will still be held, so exporters should pair UN 38.3 documentation with GOEIC registration and confirm current carriage rules with their freight forwarder.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 运输是最强的重叠环节：中国出口所用的UN 38.3测试摘要即埃及在IMDG/IATA下所要求的同一证据，故合规货物通常已具备运输条件。剩余工作属文件层面——UN 38.3摘要、危险品申报单、包装标记及荷电状态限值须随货，并在亚历山大、塞得港或杜姆亚特与GOEIC进口档案一并出示。运输合规但未在GOEIC注册的货物仍会被扣留，故出口商应将UN 38.3文件与GOEIC注册配套，并向货代核实现行运输规则。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 運輸是最強的重疊環節：中國出口所用的UN 38.3測試摘要即埃及在IMDG/IATA下所要求的同一證據，故合規貨物通常已具備運輸條件。剩餘工作屬文件層面——UN 38.3摘要、危險品申報單、包裝標記及荷電狀態限值須隨貨，並在亞歷山大、塞得港或杜姆亞特與GOEIC進口檔案一併出示。運輸合規但未在GOEIC登記的貨物仍會被扣留，故出口商應將UN 38.3文件與GOEIC登記配套，並向貨代核實現行運輸規則。
